name: Creamy Caramels
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
1. Line an 8 inch square pan with foil and butter the foil; set aside.
2. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and butter in a 3 quart saucepan.
3. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Boil slowly for 4 minutes without stirring.
5. Remove from the heat and stir in milk.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook until a candy thermometer reads 238°F (soft ball stage), stirring constantly.
7. Remove from the heat and stir in vanilla.
8. Pour into prepared pan. Cool.
9. Remove from pan and cut into 1 inch squares.
10. Wrap individually in waxed paper; twist ends.
